ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Craig Soto.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Ashwin Ladva, Esq. appeared with plaintifff Kevin Tassi, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Craig Soto.
Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract was filed on October 10, 2017 and served on November 18, 2017.
Default was entered against defendant on April 19, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on June 28, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Kevin Tassi, and against the Defaulted Defendant Craig Soto, as follows:

Repayment of Principal - $5,000.00.
Incentive Payment: $5,000.00.
Delivery of the Porsche 911.
Prejudgment Interest - $80,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $20,000.00.
Costs - $514.95.

Total - $110,514.95.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
